name: standards-refresh.sh path-prefix crawl follows same-prefix links and merges rules from every fetched page into one source YAML
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r32-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/docs/api $OUT/out && cat > $OUT/docs/api/index.html <<'HTML'

API

Use the stable API surface

Consumers must depend only on documented stable interfaces.

fs http HTML cat > $OUT/docs/api/fs.html <<'HTML'

fs

Close file descriptors deterministically

Programs must close every descriptor they open to avoid exhaustion.

HTML cat > $OUT/docs/api/http.html <<'HTML'

http

Set request timeouts explicitly

Servers must configure explicit socket timeouts for inbound requests.

HTML cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; T=$OUT/out/node/r32-src.yaml; [ -f $T ] && grep -q 'crawl sid=r32-src strategy=path-prefix pages_fetched=3' e.err && [ "$(grep -c '^- id:' $T | tr -d ' ')" = "3" ] && grep -q 'close-file-descriptors-deterministically' $T && grep -q 'set-request-timeouts-explicitly' $T && echo crawl-merges-linked-pages 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
